positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of celestial botanicals. Show swirling nebulas painted as oversized, blooming bioluminescent flowers, intermingled with geometric, crystalline leaf structures and crescent moons. The color palette must feature deep indigo, ethereal teal, warm gold accents, and deep violet. The composition should be entirely central and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Use strong, clean silhouettes and a high-contrast, engraved etching style mixed with vibrant watercolor luminescence. Clean vector lines are paramount. Macro-view, studio lighting, fantasy art, kawaii aesthetic, highly detailed.
